urdu transliteration text: Fatima ki lash par hasnain as karty thay bukaa
english translation text: Hasan and Hussain were crying at the body of Fatima (s.a.)

urdu transliteration text:
ammaa'n zahra sa aankhai'n khoolo kuch to bolo ammaa’n
ammaa'n zahra sa kam sini me'n yu'n na ruuthoo ammaa'n
english translation text: Oh Mother! Please open your eyes and say something. We are young please don’t be upset

urdu transliteration text:
ham tarasty hai'n sadaa aaygi maadar ki hamai'n
mery bacchoo'n mery piaaroo'n kuch to boolo ammaa'n
english translation text: We are eagerly waiting for your reply Oh Mother! Please say “my love, my dear kids”

urdu transliteration text:
khaali bister ko tery taktay hai'n ham hasrat say
raat bhar kay ham hai'n jaagay tum sulaao ammaa'n
english translation text: With grief, we are looking at your empty bed. Oh Mother, please come put us to bed, we have been up all night

urdu transliteration text:
haal kyaa hogaya dekho zara rootay rootay
ham ko seenay say lagaao chup karaaao ammaa'n
english translation text: Look at our condition and weepPlease come to comfort us, Oh Mother

urdu transliteration text:
kon ab piaar say chuumay gaa hamaraa maatha
kon ab piaar kary gaa ye bataao ammaa'n
english translation text: Who will kiss our foreheads now?Who will love us like you, oh Mother?

urdu transliteration text:
tum nay mangwaaye thay jannat say hamary jo libaas
aaj phir haathoo'n say apny wo pinhaao ammaa'n
english translation text: Please dress us in the clothes which you received from Heaven.

urdu transliteration text:
arsalaan azmi rootay rahay chaaroo'n bacchay
or kehtay rahay mat choor kay jaao ammaa'n
english translation text: The four children were crying, “Please don’t leave us Mother!”
